overall.description: A first-person helicopter cockpit view flying through dense fog over a historic European city resembling Prague. The aircraft maneuvers around the city center revealing Prague Castle on a hill before crossing over the Vltava River, with visibility gradually decreasing into a whiteout over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense historic city center with red-tiled roofs

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter steadily over the fog-covered historic city center

entered.detail: flight instrument dashboard with gauges and GPS screen visible in cockpit foreground
dense cluster of historic European buildings with distinctive red roofs barely visible through fog
tall Gothic church spire rising above the surrounding rooftops

segments.scene_description: Flying over a dense historic European city with red-tiled roofs barely visible through heavy golden-hour fog. The helicopter instrument panel dominates the foreground while the aircraft maintains steady forward motion over the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle district with cathedral on elevated hill

events.description: helicopter banks left revealing Prague Castle and St. Vitus Cathedral spires on the hill

agents.ego_description: banking left around the city center to approach the castle landmark on the hill

entered.detail: massive castle complex with multiple spires and fortified walls on elevated terrain
twin Gothic spires of the cathedral rising prominently from the castle grounds

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left in a wide turn, revealing the distinctive silhouette of Prague Castle and St. Vitus Cathedral rising above the fog-covered city on a hill to the left, while the dense red-roofed cityscape shifts to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide river crossing with historic stone bridge

events.description: urban cityscape transitions to wide river as helicopter crosses over water

agents.ego_description: flying over the river with sun reflecting off the water surface, descending slightly

entered.detail: wide river with calm water surface reflecting the golden sunlight breaking through fog
historic stone bridge spanning the river with multiple arches visible

segments.scene_description: Leaving the city behind, the helicopter crosses over the Vltava River with a historic stone bridge visible to the left. The sun breaks through the fog creating a bright golden reflection on the water surface as the aircraft continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: river surface in dense fog bank

events.description: visibility drops significantly entering dense fog bank over water, approaching whiteout

agents.ego_description: continuing flight over water in near-whiteout conditions with minimal visibility

segments.scene_description: Visibility deteriorates significantly as the helicopter flies deeper into the fog bank over the river. The horizon becomes completely obscured, the water surface fills the lower frame, and only the cockpit instrument panel remains clearly visible in the near-whiteout conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over a historic European city that shifts from a shrouded urban expanse to a revealing panoramic view of a hilltop fortress. It begins with a steady forward motion over a dense landscape of red-tiled roofs barely visible through heavy golden-hour fog, with the helicopter instrument panel framing the foreground. As the aircraft maintains its course, the camera begins a wide bank to the left, causing the cityscape to slide toward the right of the frame. This turn gradually unveils the distinctive silhouette of Prague Castle and St. Vitus Cathedral rising majestically above the fog-covered hill. The scene finally settles on this architectural landmark as the aircraft completes its maneuver over the misty city.

The shot follows a continuous flight over a river that transitions from a moment of golden clarity into a dense, blinding whiteout. It begins as the helicopter leaves the city behind, crossing the Vltava River with a historic stone bridge visible to the left. As the aircraft moves forward, the sun breaks through the haze to cast a bright golden reflection across the water's surface. The scene then shifts as visibility deteriorates significantly, pulling the helicopter deeper into a thick fog bank that completely obscures the horizon. Finally, the environment fades into a near-whiteout where the water fills the lower frame and only the cockpit instrument panel remains clearly visible.
